history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: An illustrated split-face anime-style portrait shows two characters facing forward with an overlaid title and repeated name text.

The main visual focus is a vertical split image: the left side shows a person with light skin wearing a pale yellow hood and a greenish face covering or mask area, with one eye visible looking forward; the right side shows a person with light skin wearing a brown hair covering or hood-like shape around dark hair, with a visible eye that includes a red accent around the iris and a serious expression. Each side has distinct hair and headwear, and the two faces meet along the center vertical line.

The setting is unclear because the image is an illustration with a stylized background. Behind the left character, the background appears yellow-orange with faint shapes, while behind the right character, the background appears darker blue-gray.

The lighting is flat and graphic, with bold outlines and high-contrast shading. On the top of the image, large white uppercase text with a dark outline reads across the center. At the bottom, there are two separate blocks of large text, one under the left character and one under the right character, both matching the same style.

Visible Text:
KENAPA TUH
KIRA
KIRA

Practical Summary:
The image is a side-by-side split illustration of two anime-style faces with different head coverings and eye details. Large text overlays the top and bottom of the frame, including repeated “KIRA” at the bottom for both halves.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

K E N A P A  T U H  
KIRA  
KIRA  

# Structured Version

- **KENAPA TUH**
- **KIRA** (appears twice)

# Notes

- Spacing in **“KENAPA TUH”** appears stylized (letters spaced out), but the text reads **KENAPA TUH**.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
